title: Replace/Implement alternative to .dockerignore as a standard name convention.
body: To further abstract docker from a standard OCI model, would be possible to replace the .dockerignore with a .containerignore ?

comments.body: After our chat in IRC, I think you meant to desribe ".dockerignore", correct?
We don't support .containerignore.  Just .dockerignore thus far.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
